functionality: dwells: settle MPPT_SP_SETTLE_MS, average chg_current over MPPT_SP_MEASURE_MS, P&O step the setpoint (adaptive step, noise gate, collapse/dip push-up with session floor)
PWM_control: CC controls pwm (inner vreg loop realises each probe; MPPT never writes pwm)

functionality: setpoint frozen; exits on hold-expiry re-probe or collapse escape

state: NOTE: this table describes the setpoint-P&O tracker (CHARGER_INPUT_VREG=1). With CHARGER_INPUT_VREG=0 the legacy PWM-perturbing inc-conductance tracker applies: TRACKING owns the PWM (CC skips regulation) and HOLD publishes mppt_limit_ma from the best power found. See README.md, MPPT algorithm.
